name: ux-research-toolkit
description: Guided UX research map creation — experience maps, customer journey maps, service blueprints, storyboards, and user story maps. Helps non-experts create professional UX artifacts through dialogue, JSON data, and interactive HTML visualization.

plugins.name: ux-research-toolkit
plugins.description: Guided UX research toolkit: 6 skills (1 guided entry point + 5 map-type shortcuts), 2 agents (HTML renderer + persona builder), 5 map types (Experience Map, Customer Journey Map, Service Blueprint, Storyboard, User Story Map). JSON-first with modular schemas, composable HTML components, and inline editor via File System Access API. Imports personas from SRD and business-model-toolkit. Based on NN/g methodology.
